living-concrete.knowledge: Compaction hierarchy: | Layer | Compaction | | GENESIS + Soul (system prompt) | IMMUNE | | Faculties (Skill() loads) | VULNERABLE | | Tool results, thinking | VULNERABLE — oldest first | SessionStart hook fires after compaction, reinjects .mem + journal.
.{agent}.bashrc = body config (PATH, aliases), loaded via CLAUDE_ENV_FILE. .{agent}.mem = mind config. Both persist across sessions.

Agent(subagent_type, team_name, name) = spawn in BentOS. Same-soul: subagent_type=self. Cross-soul: subagent_type=other.soul. TeamCreate required first. SendMessage for all communication. GENESIS + soul + faculties statically linked in every BentOS spawn.

Teammates run until leader sends shutdown_request via SendMessage. Context exhaustion → auto-compaction (transparent). Identity survives, hook reinjects .mem. No OOM — compaction is virtual memory paging. Write .mem on significant understanding shifts (hook reinjection freshness).
living-concrete.antipattern: DON'T cd to run a CLI tool. bentos-agent is in PATH. Trust your body.
